examples.english: The man tied his shoes tightly.

senses.gloss: to strengthen (used with the word for "heart" قَلْب (qalb))

examples.text: وَرَبَطْنَا عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ إِذْ قَامُوا فَقَالُوا رَبُّنَا رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ
examples.english: And We strengthened their hearts when they stood up and declared, “Our Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth.

examples.text: لَوْلَا أَن رَّبَطْنَا عَلَىٰ قَلْبِهَا لِتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
examples.english: had We not reassured her heart in order for her to have faith ˹in Allah’s promise˺.
